steps.title: Map the sequence already established
steps.content: The passage walks through the ebru process in order: "First, the artisan fills a shallow tray...Next, the artisan adds inks or paints..." The blank introduces the action that completes the procedure (slipping paper in and out to transfer the design).

steps.title: Decide what the transition must do
steps.content: Because First and Next have already been used, the blank needs a word that signals the last step in a stepwise procedure, not contrast, cause, or correction.

steps.title: Eliminate per choice
steps.content:
• "Actually,": signals correction of a prior statement; nothing earlier is being corrected. ✗
  • "Therefore,": signals cause-and-effect, but slipping paper through the bath is the next step, not a logical consequence. ✗
  • "Nevertheless,": signals contrast with the prior idea, and there is no opposing idea here. ✗
  • "Finally,": signals the concluding step in a sequence, matching the First/Next pattern. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
